title: Fall Feelings
desc: The last warmth of an Indiana autumn, reflected in still water. I took this picture in my own neighborhood and could not stop thinking about it until I painted it.

title: Another Calm Landscape
desc: A summer field under a restless sky, the kind of afternoon that makes you stop and look up.

title: Before Rain
desc: That particular stillness when the sky is building and the air holds its breath. I was so struck by this sky that I photographed it immediately and tried to capture its drama through my brushwork.

title: I-65
desc: The open road and an endless Indiana sky. This is my road every single day, and I never stop finding it beautiful.

title: Llutxent
desc: A view of the town where my father was born, nestled in the hills of Valencia, Spain. A painting made from memory and love.

title: Summer Path
desc: A path leading somewhere green and quiet. An invitation to slow down and follow.

title: Green Light
desc: Summer light breaking through the trees, that luminous moment when everything feels alive and still at the same time.

title: July
desc: A wide open Indiana field under a sky full of possibility. The simplest and most honest kind of beauty.

title: The Bend
desc: A path that curves and disappears into the trees, taking the eye and the heart somewhere just out of sight.

title: Pink Morning
desc: An Indiana summer morning with flowers that took over the foreground and refused to be ignored.

title: A Garden in Mexico
desc: A lush and vivid garden full of bougainvillea, palm trees and green mountains. A place that feels like warmth itself.

title: Oranges
desc: Two oranges on a branch, painted against a cool turquoise background. A simple moment of color and light.

title: Window Garden
desc: Two houseplants in the morning light of a quiet room. A small reminder that beauty lives in the everyday.

title: My Moment
desc: A cappuccino on a quiet morning, the pause before the day begins. Painted for everyone who knows that feeling.
